risk_statement: Privileged access is not appropriately restricted or monitored
control_description: Privileged accounts must be assigned only to approved users with documented ownership and periodic review

risk_statement: Users may access corporate systems without strong authentication
control_description: All active workforce and contractor accounts must have MFA enabled unless a documented exception exists

risk_statement: Service accounts may exist without accountable ownership
control_description: All privileged service accounts must have a named technical and business owner

risk_statement: Critical and high-risk vulnerabilities may remain open past remediation timelines
control_description: Critical and high findings must be remediated within defined SLA thresholds

risk_statement: User access may remain active after workforce termination
control_description: Terminated users must have logical access removed promptly and no post-termination activity should occur

risk_statement: Production systems may operate on unsupported or legacy operating systems
control_description: Production assets must remain on supported operating systems with approved exception handling

risk_statement: Critical services may not be recoverable if backup controls fail
control_description: Critical systems must have successful backup status and timely follow-up on failures

risk_statement: Disaster recovery weaknesses may persist without retest validation
control_description: Failed backup restore and DR tests must be retested and evidentially closed

risk_statement: Public cloud resources may expose sensitive services or data
control_description: Public exposure of storage and compute resources must be restricted and monitored
test_name: Public or Overly Broad Storage Policies

risk_statement: Production firewall rules may be overly permissive or insufficiently reviewed
control_description: Broad or any-any rules must be justified approved and periodically reviewed

risk_statement: Administrative rights may be assigned outside approved group-based governance
control_description: Administrative rights must be assigned through approved role groups with documented ownership and review
test_name: Admin Rights Assigned Outside Approved Groups

risk_statement: Critical internet-facing assets may remain exposed while high-risk findings are still open
control_description: Critical internet-facing assets must be prioritized for remediation and monitored until high-risk findings are closed
test_name: Critical Internet-Facing Assets with Open Findings
